UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LALLUBHAI, MAHENDRA A. AS TO DEFENDANT WEBB, JAMES C. DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM MARK MULLEN. CLERK D. CARTER. CASE DID NOT SETTLE. TO TRIAL AS SCHEDULED.

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LALLUBHAI, MAHENDRA A. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JAN-23-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON FEB-03-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 08 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

#8, JUDGE H. DONALDSON - RPT, M LYON - CLERK, G.DECKER C/C FOR J. TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/STEVE LITTMAN AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIPULATED JUDGMENT - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 1018 MISSION ST, #311, S.F, CA.- WRIT MAY ISSUE & BE POSTED IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 2-25-97, 5PM - ALL RENT, DAMAGES & COSTS WVD. - IF DEF DOESN'T VACATE AS AGREED, AMENDED JUDGMENT MAY ENTER FOR RESTITUTION OF PREMISES & $1500 RENT & DAMAGES - RENTAL AGREEMENT FORFEITED. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEBB, JAMES C. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1018 MISSION, #311, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL FEB-25-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE & POSTING IMMEDIATELY. IF DEF. DOESN'T VACATE AS AGREED, PL. MAY HAVE AMENDED JUDGMENT FOR $1500 RENT & DAMAGES. PREMISES TO BE LEFT IN BROOM CLEAN CONDITION. NO FURTHER STAYS OF EVICTION.
